programme.title: A Royal Surprise
programme.desc: When Riley's boyfriend, Mandla, invites her to South Africa to meet his family, she is shocked to discover that he is a prince. The news puts Riley's trust in Mandla in jeopardy, and he must do what he can to win her love back.

programme.title: My Why
programme.desc: Mywhy.tv is a project that is designed to bring the message of Jesus to the forefront of the pop culture conversation through the art of storytelling.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is real, life-changing and uplifting, Glorious Gospel Church and their values are based firmly in the bible and their aim is to express the Good News of Jesus Christ in a practical way.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Because God is all-powerful, we can depend on His presence and power to work on our behalf. Nothing is impossible for Him.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is the Catholic Guy. His presentations will uplift, inform and challenge you to move to higher level of faith and life. He will leave you knowing where you want to go and what to do next.

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: Reincarnation is a popular belief, but what does the bible say?

programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Friends and Heroes is an animated children's adventure based in Ancient Egypt, Israel and Rome. The story follows two young friends Macky and Portia as they fight for justice against the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Hillsong Kids: Cubbyhouse
programme.desc: An entertaining show for the little ones aged between 2 and 6, with songs, fun craft time, bible stories and animated teaching and illustrations.

programme.title: God Rocks! Playlist
programme.desc: Join kid-hosts Myles and Stella for a fun, non-stop musical playlist of hit songs about Faith and Trust!

programme.title: Hunter & Twerp Scripture Seekers
programme.desc: Welcome to the wonderful world of Brightington, home of Hunter and Twerp, Scripture Seekers! Stacks of fun Bible lessons for children to enjoy.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.sub-title: A Wake-Up Call for the Slacker
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame...Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Holy Moly
programme.desc: This program turns the Bible into a living, breathing colouring book that will delight children of all ages. The series focuses on the Biblical characters' actions and emotions.

programme.title: Lessons From The Bible
programme.desc: Join Pastor Doug, Dusty, Amelia and all the characters as they learn about the Bible and how it applies to daily life. Games, songs, and some silly puppets will inspire kids.

programme.title: Deditos
programme.desc: This quirky kids show introduces children to classic stories from the Old Testament using finger puppets.

programme.title: The Blello Show
programme.desc: Join Kyle, Lyds, Extra Bear, and Stu as they share with you some cool vids, catchy catch phrases crazy challenges, things you can do in three minutes, and other random stuff to make your life awesome.

programme.title: Arise Kids TV
programme.desc: ARISE Kids TV is jam packed full of faith and fun delivered by your favourite friends! Arise Kids TV believes in the next generation aims to inspire, connect and empower kids to follow Jesus and love life.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates is a young spy with a whole lot to learn. One day he's paired with a very unlikely partner, his mum. She knows more about shopping than solving crime, but her wisdom and kindness somehow seem to save the day.

programme.title: Kids Beach Club
programme.desc: Join the Beach Club Kids as they navigate life, explore character lessons, and have a blast playing memorable games while discovering God through the pages of His Word, the Bible.

programme.title: Centuries Collide
programme.sub-title: Charles Babbage - The TRUE Father of Modern Computing
programme.desc: Charles Babbage's brilliant mind was way ahead of its time. Babbage invented a fully functional mechanical calculator that became the foundation of the modern-day computer.

programme.title: View & Chew
programme.desc: The Empire State strikes back with an all out pizza vs pizza extravaganza. From old classics to wild combinations, Allie & Kels try all the pizza NYC has to offer.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Speak Your Way To A Long, Happy Life
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Adventurer Leon Logothetis hops on a vintage motorbike for a 25,000-mile trip around the world with no money, food, petrol or place to stay. He puts his fate in the hands of strangers.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: Charlie Fetoai believes life is about what we can give to others. Growing up in a large family, succeeding in professional sport, and surviving a horrific accident, he's shown incredible discipline and determination.

programme.title: A Royal Surprise
programme.desc: When Riley's boyfriend, Mandla, invites her to South Africa to meet his family, she is shocked to discover that he is a prince. The news puts Riley's trust in Mandla in jeopardy, and he must do what he can to win her love back.

programme.title: The Wedding Veil Unveiled
programme.desc: Emma travels to Italy to teach and research a wedding veil said to bring its owner love. While there, she meets Paolo, the son of a local lace-making family.

programme.title: Compassion Stories
programme.desc: Follow powerful stories highlighting the transformative work of the Compassion Child Sponsorship Program in Africa, South America, India and Asia.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Bobby Schuller provides principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Give Me an Answer
programme.desc: Exploring answers to life's most difficult questions and recorded on college campus across the United States, Cliffe Knechtle engages with students and professors, to give real answers to tough questions about Christianity.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered
programme.desc: To The Moon and Back: The Postables embark on a road trip to locate a talented young singer/songwriter hiding from her past. As they track down and reunite the family, Oliver receives a box of letters from his father to help prepare him.

programme.title: The Good Road
programme.desc: A chef, a basket weaver and a Grammy Awarded drummer teach us about Gullah culture.

programme.title: Celtic Rhythms
programme.desc: Take a journey through Ireland, Scotland, England, & Wales for an adventure in prayer & faith. Travel deep into the heart of Celtic lands; be inspired by the early Celtic Christians to build a rhythm of prayer.

programme.title: I Am Second
programme.desc: Hip-hop artist Lecrae details the fuel that started his worldwide impact. Reality TV personality Michael Ketterer and wife and Ivey show how adoption helped create a family where love conquers all.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Because God is all-powerful, we can depend on His presence and power to work on our behalf. Nothing is impossible for Him.

programme.title: Planetshakers
programme.desc: Join Planetshakers for their church service in Melbourne. A fresh Word with praise and worship each week. Live empowered.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: Destined to Ride
programme.desc: A young girl and her friend team up against two local boys on an epic horseback riding adventure in the country.

programme.title: Ann Rule's A Murder To Remember
programme.desc: Javier and Robin Rivera are celebrating their one-year anniversary on a camping trip. But when Javier ends up dead, Robin finds herself alone in the rough wilderness.

programme.title: Who Killed JonBenet?
programme.desc: Revisit the infamous murder of pint-sized beauty queen JonBenet Ramsey and the lurid details that captivated a nation.

programme.title: To Have and to Hold
programme.desc: Alice, who still can't believe her high school crush, the dashing, wealthy, and successful Joe, would choose to marry her, willingly allows him to mould her into his ideal socialite wife.

programme.title: V.C Andrews' Pearl In The Mist
programme.desc: Fate whisked Ruby from a simple life in the Louisiana bayou. But her new riches bring more treachery than happiness.

programme.title: Road Trip Hostage
programme.desc: A deranged criminal forces a young woman to drive him across the country.

programme.title: I Won't Let You Go
programme.desc: Pregnant Angela can't seem to escape the stalker who is ruining her life.

programme.title: Silent Night, Fatal Night
programme.desc: When best-selling mystery author Mallory Dearborn decides to end her long-running detective franchise, her unhinged manager takes her prisoner and forces her to write a new novel during the holidays.

programme.title: Watch Your Back
programme.desc: A woman and her husband become increasingly scared as an anonymous person begins stalking their family.

programme.title: Oscar Pistorius: Blade Runner Killer
programme.desc: The true story of the sprint runner and his rise to fame as a Paralympian gold medallist. It all shattered one evening when four bullets were fired and his beautiful girlfriend's life was taken.

programme.title: The Man in the Guest House
programme.desc: When a couple converts their garage into a second living space to rent out, they think they've found the perfect source of extra income, but their first renter soon proves to be the worst.

programme.title: The Paramedic Who Stalked Me
programme.desc: After a deadly accident, a young woman becomes the target of an obsessed EMT worker who saved her life.

programme.title: Secrets In The Desert
programme.desc: While on a road trip through the desert, Charlie and her boyfriend Aidan break down in the middle of nowhere.

programme.title: Happy Face Killer
programme.desc: Grisly serial killer Keith Hunter Jesperson taunts authorities with scribbled confessions bearing a smiley face at the scenes of his crimes. Based on a true story.

programme.title: Don't Scream, It's Me
programme.desc: Fifteen years ago, Liz's ex-boyfriend, Drew, is caught robbing a bank. Now, he's in her backyard, asking her to hide him after a prison escape.

programme.title: Wrath: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Single lawyer Chastity Jeffries believes she's found her perfect match in Xavier Collins, but his obsessive love forces her to confront how far she's strayed from her own principles.

programme.title: Nightmare in the Desert
programme.desc: After returning to her childhood home, someone secretly tracks an outdoor enthusiast and her urbanite boyfriend through the desert.

programme.title: It's Beginning to Look a Lot Like Murder
programme.desc: In the middle of preparing for her business' biggest season, Diana Hart learns she inherited an old house from her beloved aunt who was murdered.

programme.title: Dying to Win
programme.desc: A gymnast gets caught in a web of lies when her mother and stepfather are found murdered in the family home.

programme.desc: In part three of Aiming to Please God, Pastor Bayless shares how when you have your priorities in order, God can and will add more to your life and prosper you in ways you never thought possible.

programme.desc: Do you ever think, "If I don't take care of myself, who will?" Today, discover how trusting God and helping others can lead to true joy and peace in your life.

programme.title: It's Beginning to Look a Lot Like Murder
programme.desc: In the middle of preparing for her business' biggest season, Diana Hart learns she inherited an old house from her beloved aunt who was murdered.

programme.title: Dying to Win
programme.desc: A gymnast gets caught in a web of lies when her mother and stepfather are found murdered in the family home.

programme.title: Waking Up To Danger
programme.desc: A young mother picks up the pieces after a horrible accident damages her memory. She soon suspects her husband's indiscretions are what caused her suffering and that her family is in danger.

programme.title: The Lost Wife of Robert Durst
programme.desc: Young and wide-eyed Kathie falls in love with the charming Robert Durst, only to find their marriage turning stranger and darker as time passes.

programme.title: Bury The Past
programme.desc: Alice was married to a deranged, abusive man: a police officer who was regarded as a pillar of the community, but was secretly a monster.

programme.title: There's a New Killer in Town
programme.desc: Alice is living a quiet life in a small town when she meets Ronnie. However, one of her friends starts to suspect that there's more to him than meets the eye.

programme.title: My Child has My Doctor's Face
programme.desc: Jessica discovers that his biological father is actually her fertility doctor, she teams up with another one of the doctor's clients to bring him to justice.

programme.title: A Model Murder
programme.desc: Model Kara Woods begins to get disturbing messages from one of her fans, causing her to seek help from a security influencer. Things are fine until Kara's stalker shows up in person.

programme.title: Playing with Fire
programme.desc: After a near-fatal house fire, Natalie and Loughlin, a struggling married couple, are manipulated by an obsessive firefighter named Jack, who schemes to pit the couple against each other.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Hidden Jewel
programme.desc: Ruby struggles to find a happy life with Beau Andreas, the true father of Pearl, and to protect their daughter. Sheltered from sorrow, Pearl thrives in the sunshine of a loving home.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' All That Glitters
programme.desc: Driven from the Dumas mansion back to her beloved bayou, Ruby is determined to make a secure and happy home for her precious infant daughter, Pearl.

programme.title: You Can't Take My Daughter
programme.desc: Amy is a law student in Charlotte who is attacked and raped by Demetri, a friend of a friend. Discovering that she is pregnant from the rape, Amy makes a difficult decision to keep the baby.

programme.title: How to Live Your Best Death
programme.desc: Hoping to go after her dreams, Kristin hires Ashley, a life coach who promises to help her reach her full potential. However, things take a turn when unconventional methods start to wreak havoc,

programme.title: Murder Below Deck
programme.desc: When Lauren gives up the corporate life and a cheating boyfriend, she joins her best friend from college working aboard a luxury yacht in the South Pacific.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Murder
programme.desc: After her aunt is found dead, having mysteriously fallen overboard on a cruise ship, Olivia is thrown into rough seas as her uncle's secret past is brought to life and more deaths occur.

programme.title: Nightmare School Moms
programme.desc: Two mothers battle to see which of their overachieving daughters will be accepted to a prestigious university. However, when one of their methods quickly spirals out of control, the games turn deadly.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Do you ever think, "If I don't take care of myself, who will?" Today, discover how trusting God and helping others can lead to true joy and peace in your life.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as Songs of Praise travels throughout Britain and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: Letters from Mother Teresa
programme.desc: This movie explores the life of Mother Teresa through letters she wrote to her longtime friend and spiritual advisor, Father Celeste van Exem over a nearly fifty-year period.

programme.title: Finding the Light
programme.desc: Lizzie Oakes invites her guests into honest conversations about difficult seasons in their lives and discovers how the light of God's love got them through.

programme.title: Praise, Prayer and Preaching
programme.desc: Be part of the weekly service with Rev Keith Garner as he shares with his congregation a message from the bible.

programme.title: The Third Day
programme.desc: On the third day after Jesus' crucifixion, eyewitnesses reported that they found an empty tomb and had an encounter with a living, breathing Jesus of Nazareth. What proof do we have that the resurrection really happened?

programme.title: The Week that Changed the World
programme.desc: Journey step by step through the events of Holy Week, shedding light on the key players, unravelling the political intrigue, and answering longstanding questions about what happened, and why.

programme.title: About Miracles
programme.desc: About Miracles features four dramatic, true stories about modern day miracles. Told by the actual people involved and featuring gripping reenactments, these stories are as amazing as they are faith strengthening.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Speak Your Way To A Long, Happy Life Pt 2 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.sub-title: A Wake-Up Call for the Slacker
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame...Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates is a young spy with a whole lot to learn. One day he's paired with a very unlikely partner - his mum!

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: A vision of Dr Jack Graham to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Adventurer Leon Logothetis hops on a vintage motorbike for a 25,000-mile trip around the world with no money, food, petrol or place to stay. He puts his fate in the hands of strangers.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Election Day has the entire town supporting Lucas, hoping he will be the one to save the Valley from Union City Holdings. Elizabeth adjusts to this new life, as Rosemary and Lee baptise Goldie.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: LIFE Church - Online
programme.desc: Join Senior Pastors Paul and Maree de Jong along with the LIFE Team for their Sunday service experience, pre-recorded from their Central Campus in Auckland, New Zealand.

programme.title: Day of Discovery
programme.desc: Sheridan and Merryn Voysey understand the struggle of infertility and candidly share their broken dream and how they ultimately found peace.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Have you ever considered yourself God's clay? Joyce explains how He shapes and moulds us to become more like Himself.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as Songs of Praise travels throughout Britain and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: Letters from Mother Teresa
programme.desc: This movie explores the life of Mother Teresa through letters she wrote to her longtime friend and spiritual advisor, Father Celeste van Exem over a nearly fifty-year period.

programme.title: Live @ Psalter Studios
programme.desc: Docu-music series featuring an array of Christian musicians including such artists as Josh Cunningham (The Waifs), Anna Weatherup and Castles In Air, an Indie Rock band from California.

programme.title: Kids Beach Club
programme.desc: Join the Beach Club Kids as they navigate life, explore character lessons, and have a blast playing memorable games while discovering God through the pages of His Word, the Bible.

programme.title: Torchlighters: Heroes of the Faith
programme.desc: With war raging and soldiers closing in, wounded missionary Gladys Aylward sets out on the most difficult journey of her life - a 100-mile trek over mountains with 100 orphaned children to find a safe haven.

programme.title: Ancestors: New Testament
programme.sub-title: Mary and Martha, Syrophoenician Woman, Sheep
programme.desc: Discover how similar we are to our faith ancestors from. Hilarious animations reveal more about Bible heroes, villains, and everyday folks that God selected to do extraordinary things.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is the Catholic Guy. His presentations will uplift, inform and challenge you to move to higher level of faith and life. He will leave you knowing where you want to go and what to do next.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.desc: Gary Kent is passionate about sharing the good news of Christ and preparing people for the soon coming of Jesus, offering Biblical answers to life's questions.

programme.title: Helping Hands
programme.desc: This inspiring and uplifting program facilitates conversations to empower viewers to make a positive impact in their own circles of influence.

programme.title: Plus One at an Amish Wedding
programme.desc: A busy young doctor receives a surprise when her boyfriend changes their plans to go to on a romantic trip Paris for an invitation to his brothers wedding - in Amish Country.

programme.title: Vindication
programme.desc: An episodic crime drama that follows the investigative work of Detective Gary Travis. New characters, new crimes, hard-hitting issues, spiritual revelations, surprising new romances and shocking new rivalries.

programme.title: Dream: Live with Purpose, Learn to Dream
programme.sub-title: Writing for Jesus with Bryan and Katie Torwalt
programme.desc: Dream is a documentary series featuring the stories of diverse people from around the globe, who found purpose when they embraced their God-given dream.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.desc: A seven-week series looking at the discipleship lessons that are found in Jesus' letters to the seven churches from the book of Revelation.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Speak Your Way To A Long, Happy Life Pt 3 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, this is a daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Have you ever considered yourself God's clay? Joyce explains how He shapes and moulds us to become more like Himself.

programme.title: Nightmare School Moms
programme.desc: Two mothers battle to see which of their overachieving daughters will be accepted to a prestigious university. However, when one of their methods quickly spirals out of control, the games turn deadly.

programme.title: The Night Stalker
programme.desc: An attorney who lived in LA during the Night Stalker's murder spree attempts to clear the name of an inmate who she believes was wrongly accused of the crimes.

programme.title: Petals on the Wind
programme.desc: A decade after Cathy, Christopher, and Carrie escaped from their grandparents' attic, the family attempt to put their past behind them, but soon discover certain secrets can't be left behind.

programme.title: V.C Andrews' Ruby
programme.desc: In the heart of the bayou, Ruby Landry lives a simple, happy life. The only family Ruby has ever known are her loving guardian, Grandmere Catherine, and her drunken Grandpere Jack.

programme.title: Nanny Dearest
programme.desc: Ex-con Taylor tracks down a married couple who received one of her eggs 10 years ago. She becomes fixated on their daughter and will stop at nothing from becoming a mother again.

programme.title: Amish Witches: Story of Holmes County
programme.desc: A reality TV crew moves into Holmes County, Ohio, to document the lives of an isolated sect of Swartzentruber Amish. Production is halted by the death of a Brauchau, an Amish witch.

programme.title: Murder at the Country Club
programme.desc: An assistant manager finds her life in danger when she uncovers corrupt activities at a prestigious country club.

programme.title: Love Triangle Nightmare
programme.desc: Brittany meets a stranger who has everything she wants in a partner and despite being an unknown man as warned by others, she falls in love with him which leads to something tragic.

programme.title: A Deadly Threat to My Family
programme.desc: Marielle becomes suspicious when her sister-in-law escapes from a cult and seeks refuge at her home. When another cult member shows up on her doorstep, she fears her daughter is their next target.

programme.title: The Venice Murders
programme.desc: When her new roommate goes missing in Italy, an art student teams up with her eccentric aunt to save her friend and bring the kidnapper to justice.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Web of Dreams
programme.desc: Heaven's mother Leigh had to escape from Farthinggale Manor and the secrets she harboured. Falling into the arms of Luke Casteel Sr, his devotion promised her hope as only Luke knew her secrets.

programme.title: Man with my Husband's Face
programme.desc: When a woman's husband disappears during a kayak trip, everyone assumes that he drowned. When she catches a glimpse of a man who looks exactly like him, it sets off a chain of events.

programme.title: Woman with the Red Lipstick
programme.desc: Lucy and her boyfriend assume fake names and roleplay meetings for the first time. Later, Lucy sees a news report about a missing persons case where the victim has the same name.

programme.title: Living With My Mother's Killer
programme.desc: Still reeling from the tragic murder of her mother years ago, Mara forgives the murderer, and allows him to work on her property, only to find that the past is not always past.

programme.title: Murder in Nashville
programme.desc: A woman gets swept up in a whirlwind romance with the son of a wealthy power player in the country music scene.

programme.title: Who Killed JonBenet?
programme.desc: Revisit the infamous murder of pint-sized beauty queen JonBenet Ramsey and the lurid details that captivated a nation.

programme.title: Wedding Planner Mystery
programme.desc: A wedding planner turns amateur sleuth when she investigates a suspicious death and the kidnapping of a bride.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Have you ever considered yourself God's clay? Joyce explains how He shapes and moulds us to become more like Himself.

programme.title: Plus One at an Amish Wedding
programme.desc: A busy young doctor receives a surprise when her boyfriend changes their plans to go to on a romantic trip Paris for an invitation to his brothers wedding - in Amish Country.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered
programme.desc: A Tale of Three Letters. The POstables are back identifying the intended recipients of a trio of dead letters which have a surprising, personal impact on all of them.

programme.title: His Only Son
programme.desc: After being called on by the Lord, Abraham's faith is tested on his three day journey to sacrifice his son.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Travel back in time to join Dr Billy Graham and his crusade team at the events that changed the lives of thousands around the world.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is real, life-changing and uplifting, Glorious Gospel Church and their values are based firmly in the bible and their aim is to express the Good News of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Speak Your Way To A Long, Happy Life Pt 3 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: Hillsong Kids: Cubbyhouse
programme.desc: An entertaining show for the little ones aged between 2 and 6, with songs, fun craft time, bible stories and animated teaching and illustrations.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: The Christian View
programme.desc: A fast-paced, high-energy show with a panel of sharp, well-educated, quick-witted women and men - and the occasional guest co-host - discussing today's hot topics and headlines from a Biblical perspective.

programme.title: At the Table
programme.desc: Real women, real conversations, real issues. It's where you'll find information on family, health and spirituality, but most of all, a community doing motherhood together.

programme.title: The Restoration Road
programme.desc: None of us arrive anywhere by accident. We choose, think, pray, and feel our way to our destination. Our inner GPS guides us to one of two places: destruction or restoration.

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, this is a daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: In part three of Aiming to Please God, Pastor Bayless shares how when you have your priorities in order, God can and will add more to your life and prosper you in ways you never thought possible.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: Katherine Ruonala shares a practical message of love and hope to the nations.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: A daily program with news, interviews, lifestyle features and true-life stories from a Christian perspective, including powerful and dramatic testimonies of God touching people's lives.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Keep calm and enjoy the ride. Today, Joyce shares insights to help you fully embrace your journey of spiritual growth.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: Hungering and Thirsting for God, Pt. 2/Resting In The Faithfulness Of God
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as parenting, finances, personal crises, emotions, and relationships.

programme.title: Plus One at an Amish Wedding
programme.desc: A busy young doctor receives a surprise when her boyfriend changes their plans to go to on a romantic trip Paris for an invitation to his brothers wedding - in Amish Country.

programme.title: The Good Neighbour
programme.desc: The Good Neighbour is a docuseries that explores the complexities of poverty and challenges viewers to think about what it means to be a 'good neighbour.'.

programme.title: Jeni: Hometown Harvest
programme.desc: This time it's Jeni's turn to show off her culinary skills in her new series Hometown Harvest. Jeni and her friends & family are cooking up some of her favourite foods.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame...Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.sub-title: Friends First: A Lesson in Contentment
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Holy Moly
programme.desc: This program turns the Bible into a living, breathing colouring book that will delight children of all ages. The series focuses on the Biblical characters' actions and emotions.

programme.title: The Blello Show
programme.desc: Join Kyle, Lyds, Extra Bear, and Stu as they share with you some cool vids, catchy catch phrases crazy challenges, things you can do in three minutes, and other random stuff to make your life awesome.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: Blended and stepfamilies make up around 1 in 10 families. They face unique challenges that often lead to conflict. So when Rachel's relationship with Steven became more serious, they had to navigate blending a family.

programme.title: Soul Sessions
programme.desc: An exploration into the New Zealand gospel music scene with a focus on Pacific musicians and artists.

programme.title: Drive Thru History: Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Ends of the Earth takes viewers on a 19-episode, global trek to every corner of the earth, to show how God has used ordinary people throughout history to take His saving grace to every nation and people.

programme.title: The Fantasy Makers
programme.desc: JRR Tolkien, CS Lewis, and George MacDonald were the pioneers of the fantasy genre, and their impact is unmistakable. Examines the spiritual influences of these pioneers and the lasting impact their works have on our present-day culture.

programme.title: Jesus the Game Changer
programme.desc: For? His time, Jesus was radically inclusive of both men & women. On the whole, the Church has been racially diverse, and often a place where women have experienced greater freedom than in society.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.desc: Gary Kent is passionate about sharing the good news of Christ and preparing people for the soon coming of Jesus, offering Biblical answers to life's questions.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Speak Life Not Death Pt 1 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: The Living Waters team answers questions from students about God and the bible.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Keep calm and enjoy the ride. Today, Joyce shares insights to help you fully embrace your journey of spiritual growth.

programme.title: Wedding Planner Mystery
programme.desc: A wedding planner turns amateur sleuth when she investigates a suspicious death and the kidnapping of a bride.

programme.title: Nightmare Tenant
programme.desc: A single mum takes her daughter's advice and lets out her spare room to a student in need. But the consequences are deadly.

programme.title: Ann Rule's Circle Of Deception
programme.desc: A small island community is turned upside down when one of the town's citizens, Russel Douglas, is found dead the day after Christmas.

programme.title: Big Driver
programme.desc: A mystery writer stranded on a stretch of New England road is offered assistance by another driver. She quickly discovers her saviour is actually her assailant - and a killer.

programme.title: The Pregnancy Scheme
programme.desc: Pregnant and newly single, Julia faces a looming catastrophe when she loses her job. An unlikely lifeline arrives in the form of her new friend Alana.

programme.title: Amish Stud: The Eli Weaver Story
programme.desc: A man who calls himself Amish Stud plots with his mistress to murder his wife, to the horror of his conservative Amish community.

programme.title: I'll Be Watching
programme.desc: After narrowly escaping the clutches of a deadly stalker, a beautiful young woman flees to a remote town, where she rebuilds her life and finds the man of her dreams.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets By the Lake
programme.desc: A woman returns home to prove her sister is innocent of murder. She is met by a forbidden love, dark secrets, and a family rivalry fueled by the disappearance of a childhood friend.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Heaven
programme.desc: Of all the poor people living in 'the willies', the foothills of the mountains of West Virginia, the Casteels were considered lowest.

programme.title: Framed by My Husband
programme.desc: When June's wealthy husband Rick becomes the target of an extortionist who claims he sexually assaulted her, Rick convinces his wife it's an act of revenge.

programme.title: From Straight A's to XXX
programme.desc: Miriam Weeks, a freshman at Duke University, is looking to make money to cover tuition and becomes infamously known for starring in online pornography under the pseudonym Belle Knox.

programme.title: Ann Rule's Sleeping With Danger
programme.desc: Paul Carter was like a knight in shining armour when he met flight attendant Grace Tanner and swept her into a passionate love affair. But her dream man quickly became her nightmare.

programme.title: A Daughter's Nightmare
programme.desc: Soon after her father's death, college freshman Ariel learns her mother, Dana, has met Adam, a seemingly well-meaning and charming man at a grief support group.

programme.title: The Girl Who Wasn't Dead
programme.desc: When 15-year-old Erica vanishes without a trace, authorities believe she may have been the victim of a serial killer.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Dark Angel
programme.desc: In her grandmother's fine, rich, Boston house, Heaven Casteel dreams of a wonderful new life of new friends, the best schools, clothes, and love.

programme.title: She Went Missing
programme.desc: A reporter's long-dormant stalker re-emerges when she returns to her hometown to investigative the disappearance of her childhood best friend.

programme.title: Ann Rule's A Murder To Remember
programme.desc: Javier and Robin Rivera are celebrating their one-year anniversary on a camping trip. But when Javier ends up dead, Robin finds herself alone in the rough wilderness.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Keep calm and enjoy the ride. Today, Joyce shares insights to help you fully embrace your journey of spiritual growth.

programme.title: The Young Messiah
programme.desc: Tells the story of Jesus Christ at age seven as he and his family depart Egypt to return home to Nazareth. Told from his childhood perspective, it follows young Jesus as he grows into his identity.

programme.title: Red Dust Challenge
programme.desc: A team of experienced disaster response volunteers, powered by mateship and determination, ride bicycles across the Simpson Desert to raise money for Australian charity Global Care, while lockdowns threaten to derail their adventure.

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: Hungering and Thirsting for God, Pt. 2/Resting In The Faithfulness Of God
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as parenting, finances, personal crises, emotions, and relationships, Dr Stanley believes the Bible to be the Word of God.

programme.title: David Pawson
programme.sub-title: The Biblical Attitude to Work Pt1
programme.desc: Why was the Bible written? UK Theologian, Cambridge Scholar, Pastor and Bible Teacher David Pawson explores scripture and discovers some hidden gems.

programme.title: Dolphin Island
programme.desc: After losing her parents, teenager Annabel Coleridge lives with her fisherman grandfather on a Caribbean island paradise surrounded by an extended family of loving but quirky oddballs and her best friend, a dolphin named Mitzy.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Speak Life Not Death Pt 1 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Friends and Heroes is an animated children's adventure based in Ancient Egypt, Israel and Rome. The story follows two young friends Macky and Portia as they fight for justice against the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Night Owls & Early Birds
programme.desc: Night Owls and Early Birds is a new topical Bible study show from the creators of Owlegories. Join Hoot, Savannah, Screech, Charlie, and Steve as they take a deeper dive into the truths found in God's Word.

programme.title: The Garden
programme.desc: Lenny Lion and Lucy Lamb are the caretakers for a magical garden where anything can grow. They work for The Boss (God) who gives them a new assignment to complete in every episode.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: Pastors Peter and Bev Mortlock share principles for living, hear life stories from everyday New Zealanders and equip people to mature and grow into Christ-likeness while maximising their potential.

programme.title: Alaska Missionaries
programme.desc: Missionaries, doing real work, helping people in remote parts of Alaska. With breathtaking scenery, adventurous landscapes and down to earth personalities, this Alaskan show just might become your family favourite.

programme.title: Three Chairs
programme.desc: A talk show with a difference that celebrates the art of good conversation. Hosts grapple with topics including dating, phone addiction, parenting, and gender equality.

programme.title: View & Chew
programme.desc: Kels hits the streets of Brooklyn to find the best BBQ the Big Apple has to offer while Kalani flies to Texas to see if NY holds up to a classic Texas smokehouse. Allie finds herself on a walking tour with a movie star.

programme.title: Centuries Collide
programme.sub-title: Robert Boyle - The Man Who Saw the Future
programme.desc: In the 17th century a man set out to prove that God existed. His method - SCIENCE.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Join pastor Dr David Jeremiah as he challenges viewers to take hold of the truths of God's Word for themselves and to apply it to the daily circumstances in their own life, by presenting God's truth in clear and practical applications.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: God leads us to be excellent as we go about our days. Today, Joyce shares virtues that you can apply to your life right away!

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Drive Thru History: The Gospels
programme.desc: Dave Stotts takes us on his most exciting adventure yet as he tells the story of Jesus from the locations recorded in the Gospels of Matthew, Mark, Luke, and John.

programme.title: Faith Runs Deep
programme.desc: In this new program from the producers of the award-winning series, Jesus the Game Changer, host Karl Faase travels around Australia in an iconic Holden ute, discovering a rich and inspiring history of faith.

programme.title: Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Adventurer Leon Logothetis travels from Alaska to Argentina relying on the kindness of strangers and surprising unsuspecting good Samaritans with life-changing gifts!

programme.title: Soul Sessions
programme.desc: An exploration into the New Zealand gospel music scene with a focus on Pacific musicians and artists. The award-winning artists are a mix of new and established faces, who share the vision of expressing their faith through music.

programme.title: What's Cooking with Young & Free
programme.desc: Join Young & Free in the kitchen as they serve up a feast of music videos and a side of laughs.

programme.title: OK TV
programme.desc: Brendon and Cathie have poured their 30 years of experience with kids in schools and in ministry and the great goals of the local church into a energetic show that will engage the next generation.

programme.title: Scaly Adventures
programme.desc: Join the Scaly Adventures crew on a journey around the world in search of amazing animals and incredible adventures.

programme.title: TV One Life
programme.desc: Between the humour, music and unfiltered ministry, the message is clear, "God can change your life"! Fasten your seatbelts for this roller coaster ride of a show!

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: Katherine Ruonala shares a practical message of love and hope to the nations.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: Post Natal Depression affects 1 in 5 mothers in Australia. The Be That team discuss the journey through PND and how to best support those who are navigating their way to recovery.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.sub-title: What is and What Should Never Be
programme.desc: Elizabeth encourages Gowen to seek forgiveness from Rosaleen to heal old wounds. Meanwhile Montague continues to raise suspicion. To woo the Governor, Rosemary starts a choir.

programme.title: Behind the Sash
programme.desc: In this special episode we dig deeper into the four leading ladies adversities & follow their journey to visit Sydney golden girl Ally Pinnock.

programme.title: Greater
programme.desc: Explores ways that Jesus leads people into freedom; from instant life changing God encounters, to transformation that takes places over years. Uncover practical steps towards inner freedom.

programme.title: The Divine Adventure
programme.desc: Are you looking for God's best for your life? Do you have a plan for getting there? Twelve deeply practical and intensely personal, powerful spiritual disciplines that will deepen your intimacy with God.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Travel back in time to join Dr Billy Graham and his crusade team at the events that changed the lives of thousands around the world.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Speak Life Not Death Pt 2 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: Hungering and Thirsting for God, Pt. 2/Resting In The Faithfulness Of God
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as parenting, finances, personal crises, emotions, and relationships, Dr Stanley believes the Bible to be the Word of God.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: God leads us to be excellent as we go about our days. Today, Joyce shares virtues that you can apply to your life right away!

programme.title: Ann Rule's A Murder To Remember
programme.desc: Javier and Robin Rivera are celebrating their one-year anniversary on a camping trip. But when Javier ends up dead, Robin finds herself alone in the rough wilderness.

programme.title: Seeds of Yesterday
programme.desc: The saga of the tormented Dollangangers comes to an end where the family continues to coexist miserably.

programme.title: Lust: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Tiffanie is about to have the wedding of her dreams to her soul mate Damon. But when Damon's old friend Trey arrives, fresh from prison, to be Damon's best man, Tiffanie's whole world is rocked.

programme.title: Girl in the Box
programme.desc: In 1977, Colleen Stan doesn't think twice when she hitchhikes and is picked up by young couple Cameron and Janice Hooker. But the life she knows is ripped away when they abduct her.

programme.title: Stalked by a Prince
programme.desc: Publicist Alyssa thinks she's in a fairytale when she meets a British prince who whisks her away to Europe. Alyssa's dream turns into a nightmare when the prince refuses to let her leave.

programme.title: Surviving The Sleepover
programme.desc: Outspoken teenager Hannah goes to a sleepover at a popular girl's house, not realising she was only invited to be the victim of a prank.

programme.title: Hunt for the Labyrinth Killer
programme.desc: An ace ADA works with a driven cop to catch Daedalus, a serial killer infamous for luring his victims to their deaths with elaborate traps.

programme.title: No One Would Tell
programme.desc: Laura is happy for her daughter Sarah when she begins to date the popular boy from school, Rob. It is only a matter of time before Rob begins to reveal his darker, more possessive side.

programme.title: Secret Love Triangle
programme.desc: When Jessica is falsely charged with the murder of her friend's husband, she escapes from jail and goes on the run with her husband Matt in an attempt to clear her name.

programme.title: Boy In The Attic
programme.desc: A teen girl falls in love with the boy who's been hiding in the attic of her family's new home. When she learns that he's been accused of murder, she must make a tough decision.

programme.title: A Roommate to Die For
programme.desc: After a nasty break-up, Faith needs a new roommate to supplement the rent and finds that something very strange is going on with the tenant who decides to move in.

programme.title: Who Is Killing The Cheerleaders?
programme.desc: Ellie, a former cheerleader, returns to her high school as a teacher 10 years after she was nearly killed in a series of brutal slayings on the squad.

programme.title: Stalkers
programme.desc: Frustrated with the judicial system's indifference towards stalking cases, A.D.A Julia Winston is determined to establish a task force charged with tracking and prosecuting predators.

programme.title: Vanished in Death Valley
programme.desc: A teenage girl goes missing after her family's car breaks down in Death Valley. Her parents soon find some unexpected help as they embark on a desperate search to find her.

programme.title: The Boarding School Murders
programme.desc: Foster teen Frankie attends an elite Swiss boarding school. One of her classmates is murdered and everyone is quick to blame Frankie. She must prove innocence before becoming a prime suspect.

programme.title: Hider in My House
programme.desc: As Molly Bachman settles into the apartment of her dreams, she discovers a hidden entrance to another apartment within the walls.

programme.title: I Was Lorena Bobbitt
programme.desc: The story of a severely abused young woman whose torment, both physical and mental, at the hands of her husband pushed her over the edge.
